Maharashtra Paramedical Common Entrance.note: Maharashtra paramedical admissions run through the State CET Cell on a NEET/merit basis; the official portal (403 to fetch) and competitor searches surface only NEET medical cutoffs, not college-wise paramedical opening/closing ranks. No tie-able college-branch rank table found.

Maharashtra Polytechnic Entrance Examina.note: DTE Maharashtra Post-SSC Diploma (Polytechnic) CAP Round 1 closing ranks, college + category-code wise, for CSE (2025 & 2024) and ECE (2025), extracted from CollegeDekho branch-wise cutoff tables. Category column holds DTE reservation codes (NG/NL prefix = home-university/other; suffix OPEN/SC/ST/OBC/NTx/SEBC etc.); percentile column holds the percentage shown. Official source is poly25.dtemaharashtra.gov.in PDFs; CollegeDekho transcribes them.

Manipur Bachelor of Business Administrat.note: BBA admission in Manipur (Manipur University and ~8 colleges) is merit/10+2 or direct-admission based; no centralized BBA entrance exam publishes college-wise opening/closing ranks. Searches returned only college listings and fees, no tie-able rank/cutoff table.

Manipur Polytechnic Entrance Examination.note: Manipur DTE publishes only a polytechnic admission merit list (roll numbers / marks), not college-branch opening/closing ranks. No competitor or portal cutoff table found for this state exam.

Meghalaya Bachelor of Business Administr.note: BBA admission in Meghalaya (NEHU and affiliated colleges) is merit/qualifying-marks based with no centralized entrance exam publishing college-wise ranks. No tie-able cutoff/rank table found.

Meghalaya Engineering Entrance Examinati.note: Meghalaya engineering admissions are channeled via JEE Main allotment; the state directorate publishes a merit/allotment list, not college-branch opening/closing ranks. The only college-wise rank data available (NIT Meghalaya) is a centrally-funded institute admitting through JoSAA/JEE Main, not the state's own entrance exam, so it does not match this exam. No matching cutoff table found.

Meghalaya Polytechnic Entrance Examinati.note: Meghalaya DTET publishes a polytechnic admission merit/selection list (roll numbers / marks), not college-branch opening/closing ranks. No competitor or portal cutoff table found.
